description: Component for processing text with Anthropic's Claude models.

asset_name.label: Asset Name
asset_name.description: Name of the asset that will hold the enriched data

api_key.label: Api Key
api_key.description: Anthropic API key. Use ${ANTHROPIC_API_KEY} for environment variables.

model.label: Model
model.description: Claude model: claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022, claude-3-opus-20240229, claude-3-sonnet-20240229, claude-3-haiku-20240307

system_prompt.label: System Prompt
system_prompt.description: System prompt to set context and behavior for Claude

user_prompt_template.label: User Prompt Template
user_prompt_template.description: User prompt template with {column_name} placeholders for DataFrame columns

top_k.label: Top K
top_k.description: Top-K sampling parameter. Only consider top K tokens.

tools.label: Tools
tools.description: JSON array of tool definitions for tool use

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Number of rows to process in parallel for batch operations

rate_limit_delay.label: Rate Limit Delay
rate_limit_delay.description: Delay in seconds between API calls to respect rate limits

max_retries.label: Max Retries
max_retries.description: Maximum number of retries for failed API calls

enable_caching.label: Enable Caching
enable_caching.description: Cache responses to avoid redundant API calls

track_costs.label: Track Costs
track_costs.description: Track token usage and estimated costs

partition_type.label: Partition Type
partition_type.description: Enable partitioning: 'daily', 'weekly', 'monthly', 'hourly' for time-based; 'static' for a fixed set of values (e.g. customers); 'multi' for date × static (e.g. day × customer). Leave empty for unpartitioned.

partition_start.label: Partition Start Date
partition_start.description: ISO date string for the first partition, e.g. '2024-01-01'. Required for time-based and multi partition types.

partition_date_column.label: Partition Date Column
partition_date_column.description: Column used to filter rows to the current date partition key (e.g. 'event_date', 'created_at').

partition_values.label: Partition Values
partition_values.description: Comma-separated values for static or multi partitioning, e.g. 'acme_corp,globex,initech'. Required for static and multi types.

partition_static_dim.label: Static Dimension Name
partition_static_dim.description: Name for the static partition dimension in multi-partitioning, e.g. 'customer' or 'region'. Defaults to 'segment'.

partition_static_column.label: Static Partition Column
partition_static_column.description: Column used to filter rows to the current static partition value (e.g. 'customer_id', 'region').

owners.label: Owners
owners.description: Asset owners — team names (team:analytics) or email addresses.

asset_tags.label: Asset Tags
asset_tags.description: Key-value tags applied to the asset in the Dagster catalog, e.g. {"domain": "finance"}.

kinds.label: Kinds
kinds.description: Asset kinds shown in the Dagster catalog (e.g. snowflake, python). Auto-inferred from component name if empty.

freshness_max_lag_minutes.label: Freshness Max Lag (minutes)
freshness_max_lag_minutes.description: Maximum acceptable lag in minutes before this asset is considered stale.

freshness_cron.label: Freshness Cron Schedule
freshness_cron.description: Cron schedule for the freshness policy, e.g. '0 9 * * 1-5' (weekdays 9am).

column_lineage.label: Column Lineage
column_lineage.description: Column-level lineage: output column → list of upstream input columns it derives from, e.g. {"revenue": ["price", "quantity"]}.

include_sample_metadata.label: Include Sample Metadata
include_sample_metadata.description: Include sample data preview in metadata

upstream_asset_key.label: Upstream Asset Key
upstream_asset_key.description: Upstream asset key providing a DataFrame with text to process
